info.name: Contact AI Service
info.description:
Postman collection for the Contact AI FastAPI service (AWS Lambda + API Gateway HttpApi, or local uvicorn).

**Base URL**: {{base_url}}
**Example deployed URL**: https://aziwa531nl.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
**Local development**: http://localhost:8080 (see `PORT` in app settings)

**Authentication**
- `GET /api/v1/health`, `GET /health`, `GET /`: no auth
- All other routes: `X-API-Key` (must match server `API_KEY`)
- AI Chat routes (`/api/v1/ai-chats/...`): also require `X-User-ID`

**API layout**
- **Health / meta**: lightweight `GET /api/v1/health`; richer DB health on `GET /health`; service banner on `GET /`
- **AI Chat** (`/api/v1/ai-chats`): CRUD, send message, SSE stream (7 operations)
- **AI utilities** (`/api/v1/ai`): email risk, company summary, parse-filters via Hugging Face Inference (same router as chat; not under `/gemini`)

**Stack notes**
- Chat and utility AI calls use Hugging Face Inference Providers (`HFService`, OpenAI-compatible chat completions), not Google Gemini paths.
- Chat model override values are the `ModelSelection` enum strings (e.g. `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M:fastest`).

**Usage**
1. Set `base_url`, `api_key`, `user_id` (Postman collection variables or environment).
2. Call `GET /health` or `GET /api/v1/health` to verify reachability.
3. `POST /api/v1/ai-chats/` then message / stream endpoints as needed.
4. Use `POST /api/v1/ai/...` for email, company summary, and filter parsing.

item.name: Health Check

request.description: Check service health status. Returns service name, version, and status. No authentication required.

Application-level health from `app.main`: returns cached PostgreSQL connectivity, diagnostics, and cache metadata. Triggers background refresh when stale. No authentication required.

Contrast with `GET /api/v1/health` (simple JSON from the v1 router).
Root endpoint: service name, version, and status. No authentication required.

item.description: Health and discovery (no authentication required). Prefer `GET /health` for database-aware status; use `GET /api/v1/health` for a minimal JSON probe.

item.name: AI Chat

query.description: Order by field. Prepend '-' for descending. Valid: created_at, updated_at, -created_at, -updated_at
Case-insensitive substring match against chat title
ISO 8601 datetime — filter chats created on or after this time
ISO 8601 datetime — filter chats created on or before this time
ISO 8601 datetime — filter chats updated on or after this time
ISO 8601 datetime — filter chats updated on or before this time

request.description: Get a paginated list of all AI chat conversations for a user. Only returns chats owned by the specified user (from X-User-ID header). Default ordering is by -created_at (newest first). If both the top-level `ordering` and filter-style params include `ordering`, the filter param object wins when present.

Create a new AI chat conversation. The user_id is provided via X-User-ID header (set by appointment360). The chat ID is a UUID generated automatically. Messages can be empty initially and added later via update.
Get detailed information about a specific AI chat conversation, including all messages. Only the chat owner can access their chats.

Update an existing AI chat conversation (typically to add new messages or update the title). All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated (partial update). When updating messages, provide the complete messages array (it replaces existing messages). Only the chat owner can update their chats.

Send a message in a chat and get an AI reply. Persists the user message, calls Hugging Face chat completions (`HFService`), and returns the updated chat. Only the chat owner can send messages.

**Request body**
- `message` (required): non-empty string
- `model` (optional): one of `ModelSelection` — `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M:fastest`, `HuggingFaceH4/zephyr-7b-beta:fastest`, `mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2:fastest`, `meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct:fastest`. Omit to use server default (`HF_CHAT_MODEL`).

Stream the assistant reply over SSE (`text/event-stream`). Chunks are JSON lines prefixed with `data: `; stream ends with `data: [DONE]`. Same `model` options as non-streaming send. Only the chat owner can send messages.

**Note:** Postman may buffer or truncate streams; use curl or an SSE client for full verification.
Delete an AI chat conversation. Only the chat owner can delete their chats. Deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.

item.description: AI Chat endpoints for managing conversations (7 endpoints total)

item.name: AI utilities (Hugging Face)

request.description:
Analyze an email address for risk signals via `HFService.analyze_email_risk` (LLM JSON output). Requires `X-API-Key` only.

**Request body**
- `email` (required): valid email string (`EmailStr`)

**Response**
- `riskScore`, `analysis`, `isRoleBased`, `isDisposable`

Generate a short company summary from name + industry (`HFService.generate_company_summary`). Requires `X-API-Key` only.

**Response**
- `summary`: string

Parse natural language into structured contact filters (`HFService.parse_contact_filters`). Requires `X-API-Key` only.

**Request body**
- `query` (required): natural language string

**Response**
- Optional fields: `job_titles`, `company_names`, `industry`, `location`, `employees` (min/max tuple), `seniority`

item.description: Stateless AI helpers mounted at `/api/v1/ai` (`app.api.v1.endpoints.ai`). Implemented with Hugging Face Inference, not under `/gemini`.
